---
title: "nitrix.geometry.surface"
generated: true
signature-hash: 000c56233009cc1c
description: "Surface algorithms on triangle meshes."
listing:
  id: nitrix-geometry-surface-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-geometry-surface/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.geometry.surface`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Surface algorithms on triangle meshes.

The *algorithm* layer of the geometry suite: differential-geometry quantities
(curvature, ...) that compose the *operator / measure* layer in
`nitrix.sparse.mesh` -- the cotangent Laplace-Beltrami stiffness, the
vertex-area mass, and per-vertex normals -- through the format-agnostic
`sparse.apply_operator` seam.  `geometry` depends on `sparse`, never the
reverse.

Everything here is pure JAX and differentiable w.r.t. `mesh.vertices`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `2` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_faces` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `x` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `y` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `z` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-geometry-surface-symbols}
:::
